title: System & Settings
subtitle: Manage your organization profile, roles, and global preferences.

org.title: Organization Profile
org.desc: Update your company details and branding.
org.name: Organization Name
org.supportEmailHint: Shown on the login page as "Contact Support" link

legal.title: Legal Pages
legal.intro: Content entered here is published on the login page links.
legal.privacyPh: Enter your privacy policy text here...
legal.termsPh: Enter your terms and conditions text here...

attendance.title: Attendance Rules
attendance.desc: Configure check-in/check-out boundaries, shift windows, and daily submission limits for the mobile workforce app.
attendance.earlyHint: How many minutes before shift start can workers check in.
attendance.lateHint: How many minutes after shift end can workers check out.
attendance.minHint: Workers must be checked in for at least this long before they can check out.
attendance.maxHint: Maximum number of attendance submissions per worker per day (1 check-in + 1 check-out = 2).

how.early: Workers can check in up to <0>{{n}} minutes</0> before their shift starts.
how.late: Workers can check out up to <0>{{n}} minutes</0> after their shift ends.
how.min: Check-out is blocked until <0>{{n}} minutes</0> have passed since check-in.
how.max: Each worker is limited to <0>{{n}} submissions</0> per day.
how.noShift: Workers without an assigned shift can still submit attendance — their submissions will be flagged for admin review.

security.policiesDesc: Manage password requirements and authentication methods.
security.twoFaHint: Require all admin users to use 2FA to log in.
security.strictHint: Require uppercase, numbers, and special characters.
security.sessionHint: Automatically log users out after 30 minutes of inactivity.

photoTelemetry.title: Photo Verification Telemetry
photoTelemetry.desc: Last 24 hours of auto-rotation rescues that corrected sideways portraits during photo upload.
photoTelemetry.noData: No rotation rescues in the last 24 hours.
photoTelemetry.windowHint: Counters reset every 24 hours and are per server instance.

ntp.title: Time & Clock Security
ntp.desc: Configure NTP server and organization timezone for clock tampering detection on mobile devices.
ntp.serverHint: Used by mobile devices to get trusted time independent of the device clock.
ntp.tzHint: All attendance times are displayed in this timezone. Uses IANA timezone names (handles DST automatically).
ntp.configVer: Config version: {{v}} — Mobile devices automatically pick up changes on next sync.

integrations.title: API Keys & Webhooks
integrations.desc: Generate API tokens and configure webhooks to integrate with external systems.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.desc: Irreversible actions that affect your entire organization workspace.

toasts.savedDesc: Your settings have been updated successfully.
